assertions.description: The design has 4 power MOSFETs: Q4 and Q7 (IRF9540N, P-channel) and Q5, Q6, Q8 (IRF540N, N-channel), forming complementary pairs for an H-bridge motor driver. The bridge_circuits section reports only a single half_bridge entry pairing Q6+Q5 with the output net '__unnamed_3'. The remaining power MOSFETs Q4, Q7, Q8 are not paired into bridge structures. The design should yield at least one full H-bridge (two half-bridges with a shared motor output). The power_net is listed as 'GND' and ground_net as 'OUT1', suggesting the high/low rail assignments may be swapped in detection logic.
